description: Top-of-loop self-heal reconciles ONLY leased, pipeline-owned refs in a deletable class. Human refs (default branch + feature branches) and unleased or non-deletable pipeline refs are never auto-deleted — the NEVER-DELETE-HUMAN-REFS invariant (DESIGN §11.1/§11.3).

findings.message: Self-heal deletion is bounded to leased pipeline-owned refs in a deletable class; all human and unleased refs are protected.

protected_reasons.consiliency/pipeline/v0.4: pipeline working branch — non-deletable class (reconcile rebases, never deletes)
protected_reasons.consiliency/pipeline/v0.3: pipeline working branch — non-deletable class; also unleased
protected_reasons.pipeline/impl-node9: pipeline phase-node in a deletable class but UNLEASED — self-heal needs a lease
protected_reasons.feature/my-wip: human ref — never auto-deleted even though leased by a human
